ddt:Target.Name: R0-20_v1.2
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ********************
V 0.1 18/May/2018: From the carryover database R013-Gen2_V1.41, created intial version of database for R0-20. V0.2 20/July/2018: Daimler,GM, RVM,FIAT removed from Car manufacturer list. Tweeter and Handsfree microphone configuration deleted from ECU configuration Tweeters,subwoofer,CD drive,MCH external USB $9332 DTCs deleted V0.3 07/09/2018:Data lenght modified for identification ID $F194 and $F195. VDIAG $0C deleted because ultralow variant deleted Identification ID $F180 and $F182 deleted Identification ID $F188 moved to Identification Info and removed from Identification config
V0.4 31/01/2019: Output_Information parameter(bit 3-5 of byte 7) modified for DID $2111 Value 2: External ANC box Value 3: Premium 1 Value 4: Daimler external amplifier (4channels) Value 5: Daimler external amplifier (2channels) are deleted from Output_Information parameter(bit 3-5 of byte 7)
V0.5 11/04/2019: Value corrected for HBC as 3 instead for 4 Acoustic_Whole_Car1 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car2 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car3 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car4 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car5 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car6 newly added in configuration DID $2153
V0.7 23/05/2019: Coding value modified for Vehicle environment parameter for Car Configuration DID 0x2110, Byte 5
V0.8 12/07/2019 Fault type '$1C is added for DTC $9328 DTC Code of SRRR ECU changed from E16E to E174 DataRead of 0x2000 is added in READALL button of Monitoring Data. The length of Phone Acoustic parameters.WB 6 (0x2151)is updated to 500Bytes SystemSupplierECUsoftwareNumber (0xF194) length is changed from 4 to 10. SystemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber (0xF195) length is changed from 4 to 10. SystemSupplierNumber (0xF18A) length is changed to 10 Bytes. The control State $02 is added for the IO Control TUNER SETTINGS ($9001) CNF_PACT_WB6 parameter byte length changed to 500 bytes as per spec Add XJD and X82ph2 projects applicability Add SW 4 Auto Identification for VC milestone
V0.9 24/10/2019 DID 0x2111 ECU Configuration : - Default value changed - value changed for byte 3, bits 2,1,0 : SWRC ( 010 = "SWRC not present" instead of "XJF/XJI Type Ultralow" ) DID 0x2110 Car Configuration : - Default value changed - New values added for Byte 5 : Vehicle environment $05 X82ph2 $06 HJD MY2021 - New value added for Byte 3 : Car manufacturer $04 Daimler - New Byte is used : Byte 7, Bit 0 : Display Hebrew Language 0b : Not Activated 1b : Activated
V1.0 31/01/2020 Add request for R_AFS_IO for Diag Teams $2F9002... $2F9005... Add SW 5 Auto Identification for PT1 milestone
V1.1 27/03/2020 Modification for DATA : CNF_RAD1 size 500->544 Modification screen : reprog history (for better understanding) Add : Device METER R11 Add request for R_AFS_IO for Diag Teams $2F900B...
V1.2 19/10/2020 Modification for Auto-ident Data size modification : DataRead.systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber $F195 : 4byte->6byte DataRead.systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber $194 : 4byte->10byte DataRead.systemSupplierIdentifier $18A : 3byte-> 10byte Add request ANTITHEFT_ACTIVATION_FOR_RADIO for Diag Teams $2E220101 add lastest SW8

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: ANT1.Frequency value
Data.Comment: ANT1 Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: CANM.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: Radio country
Data.Comment: World area to define tuner frequencies interval

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.RL_SoundLevelCorrection
Data.Comment: ADAS Sound Level Correction - Right Left

Data.Name: ADAS Configuration.FR_SoundLevelCorrection
Data.Comment: ADAS Sound Level Correction - Front Rear

Data.Name: CANV.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: Routinestatus
Data.Comment: Read the status of the routine

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: R_AFS_DIDW_PARAMETRAGE_ANTITHEFT_ACTIVATION_FOR_RADIO
Request.Comment: Antitheft Activation For Radio After Sale

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: These parameters are used to configure NUANCE parameters
These parameters are used to configure NUANCE parameters
These parameters are used to configure ARKAMYS parameters
These parameters are used to configure radio reception parameters
These parameters are used to configure SPVR parameters
USE WITH CAUTION : once the Antitheft is activated, it won't be possible to deactivate it !
By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
If Stop Request is not sent before 20 seconds,Test will stop automatically after 20 seconds.
This routine is used to test graphic display
Test will stop by itself after 10 seconds
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When requested by diag tool, Bluetooth RSSI & Link quality should be returned. Conditions: Mobile phone must be connected.
When a sound is requested, ECU must: • Mute all sources • Issue the requested sound • Activate microphone • Return to normal state.
It must not be possible to issue a tone to more than one (1) loudspeaker. R0-20 must be capable to analyze the incoming sound compared to the outcoming one.
